notes: current working directory is the full visible boundary for this routing layer
parent callers, sibling repos, and external services are out_of_scope

modules.name: config-surface
purpose: OTAR V2 protocol, S0 schema, HPO-grid, and formal-matrix yaml surface
expand_search_when: changing default config keys
touching experiment names consumed by CLI or registry
changing asset universe yaml or paper protocol universe selection
changing OTAR managed configs, schema freeze fields, or HPO no-test-peeking guards
scope_notes: no parent-level config may be assumed

modules.name: ai-routing-governance
expand_search_when: changed files are reported uncovered by evolve_ai_routing
new hidden contracts or recurring pitfalls are discovered
scope_notes: routing facts must stay inside the current subtree

modules.name: test-suite-surface
purpose: test discovery and route coverage for changed tests
expand_search_when: adding tests for a new source module not covered by related_tests
changing shared fixtures or pytest configuration
scope_notes: test files route back to owning source modules when a specific module route exists

modules.name: data-pipeline-family
purpose: split construction with purge, embargo, walk-forward, and last-decision-date metadata
expand_search_when: changing feature group membership
changing date filtering or availability mask semantics
changing purge, embargo, walk-forward, or strict_no_lookahead split semantics
scope_notes: dataset inputs or services outside this subtree are out_of_scope

modules.name: env-runtime-family
purpose: OTAR risk-state observation and daily diagnostic accounting

minimum_regression.ref: pytest tests/test_env.py tests/test_backtest_engine.py tests/test_execution_core.py tests/test_constraint_manager.py tests/test_cost_model.py
pytest tests/test_env.py tests/test_backtest_engine.py tests/test_execution_core.py tests/test_otar_risk_state_visibility.py tests/test_otar_reward_accounting.py tests/test_otar_weight_drift_cost.py

expand_search_when: changing decision_date versus execution_date semantics
changing daily artifact columns or pending action handling
changing risk_state observation fields or OTAR daily diagnostics
scope_notes: callers outside visible subtree are out_of_scope

modules.name: model-partial-rebalance-family
expand_search_when: changing partial_rebalance.mode values
changing tensor shapes or log-prob composition

modules.name: buffer-runtime-family
expand_search_when: changing ReplayItem fields or as_batch payload keys
changing n-step flush or split-boundary behavior
changing checkpoint replay-buffer serialization

modules.name: agent-training-family
expand_search_when: changing trainer hooks or agent factory names
changing checkpoint payload fields
changing replay or rollout buffer payloads consumed by agents
scope_notes: agent family routed from visible filenames; implementation facts need code confirmation
notes: needs_code_confirmation for key symbols until file content is re-opened

modules.name: baseline-family
purpose: CAGE and GT-RCPO activity gate execution
OTAR CQR gate native strategy and cost-aware candidate/hold execution
expand_search_when: editing baseline registry names
changing baseline output columns or risk metrics
changing activity turnover floor or learned rho fallback semantics
changing OTAR CQR candidate, hold, gate, or cost-estimation diagnostics
scope_notes: family routed from representative files; inspect concrete baseline before edit

modules.name: experiment-pipeline-family
purpose: HPO activity gate and final report selection
OTAR V2 full formal pipeline and tail calibration orchestration

minimum_regression.ref: pytest tests/test_otar_v2_full_entrypoint.py tests/test_otar_formal_matrix.py tests/test_otar_formal_artifacts.py tests/test_otar_tail_calibration.py tests/test_otar_metrics_schema.py

expand_search_when: changing experiment ids or registry keys
changing trainer output payload or aggregation columns
changing HPO activity gate or final report selection semantics
changing OTAR formal-matrix expansion, lineage validation, aggregate gating, or tail calibration labels
scope_notes: CLI or scheduler layers outside this subtree are out_of_scope
notes: key symbols confirmed from src/experiments/run_experiment.py diff and tests/test_hpo_activity_metric.py

modules.name: model-otar-cqr-family
purpose: risk-state latent extension and CQR replay training integration

minimum_regression.ref: pytest tests/test_otar_cqr_gate_contract.py tests/test_otar_actor_gate_masks.py tests/test_otar_actor_distribution_guard.py tests/test_otar_replay_buffer_contract.py tests/test_otar_risk_state_visibility.py tests/test_otar_reward_accounting.py tests/test_otar_weight_drift_cost.py

expand_search_when: changing CQR replay item fields
changing risk_state shape or model.use_risk_state
changing candidate/hold utility, tail loss, or cost estimation fields
scope_notes: generated OTAR outputs under outputs/ are artifacts, not implementation truth

modules.name: otar-v2-protocol-family
purpose: OTAR V2 S0 protocol freeze validation
formal matrix expansion and full-pipeline orchestration

minimum_regression.ref: pytest tests/test_otar_protocol_schemas.py tests/test_otar_v2_full_entrypoint.py tests/test_otar_formal_matrix.py tests/test_otar_formal_artifacts.py tests/test_otar_hpo_no_test_peeking.py tests/test_otar_metrics_schema.py tests/test_otar_run_config_contract.py tests/test_otar_tail_calibration.py

expand_search_when: changing PROTOCOL_ID, DATA_CUTOFF_DATE, RUN_CONFIGS, managed OTAR yaml, or formal-matrix expansion
changing paper aggregate protocol gates or required output tables
scope_notes: outputs/ contains generated experiment artifacts; route implementation through source/config/scripts instead

modules.name: ops-scripts-family
purpose: OTAR V2 protocol validation and run monitoring scripts
expand_search_when: changing file naming or output directory layout
changing remote fetch logic or asset universe columns
changing paper automation gate or promotion status handling
changing OTAR S0 managed files, protocol_id, manifest output, or tmux monitor behavior
scope_notes: remote data service behavior is out_of_scope
